name: Memory Allocation with Excessive Size Value
description: The product allocates memory based on an untrusted size value without ensuring it is within expected limits, allowing arbitrary amounts of memory to be allocated. This can lead to denial-of-service through resource exhaustion or subsequent NULL pointer dereferences.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides a size value that flows to a TRANSFORM node (memory allocation function) without a CONTROL node validating the size is within acceptable bounds before allocation.
